title: The Challenger from England
overview: Kanata Rivington arrives in Japan from England with the intention of racing in a relatively new motorsports category that's taken the world by storm: MFG.

title: The Shocking New MFG Generation
overview: Kanata begins his qualifying run around the 40 kilometer-long Odawara Pikes Peak, aiming to set a quick time. But with a seriously underpowered car compared to his rivals, how high up the leaderboard can he get?

title: The Kamaboko Straight
overview: Impressing everyone with his drifting abilities, Kanata aims to finish his qualifying lap with a flourish. But with a long straight just before the line exposing his car's deficiencies, will he make it into the race proper?

title: Tire Management
overview: Ren and Kanata continue their tour of Kamakura in the hopes of finding the place where Kanata's parents took their photograph together.

title: Teamwork
overview: The two-lap race of Odawara Pikes Peak is underway. With his tires now up to temperature, can Kanata start making his way through the field despite his power disadvantage?

title: The Tragic Rallyist
overview: Kanata zooms up to the back of the Yashi-Kita Gang in no time, but getting past them is another matter entirely. Meanwhile, the two leaders go wheel-to-wheel for the lead of the race.

title: The Man in the 4 Car
overview: While everyone is suitably impressed with what Kanata is achieving, there are battles up and down the field, and it quickly becomes apparent that the 86 isn't the only car the MFG viewers should be keeping a close eye on.

title: The Voice Callout
overview: On the approach to the death zone for the second time, Kanata starts to make his move. But does he have enough life left in his tires to climb up the order?

title: The 300 kph Dogfight
overview: After making up a bunch of places in the death zone, Kanata enters the final sector, but with the long straight at the end of the lap highlighting the 86's main weakness, can he hold on to his current position all the way to the checkered flag?

title: Updates
overview: Kanata managed to haul the 86 up to unexpected heights at Odawara Pikes Peak, but the next race is on a course that is a lot flatter with fewer downhill sections where he can make up for his car's lack of power, so it's time to tune his ride!

title: The Genius Awakens
overview: Qualifying begins for the second race of the season, which is set to take place at Lake Ashinoko. With Kanata set to do his run on a later day, other drivers get their moment to shine.

title: Inherited Perception
overview: Ren's mother discovers the secret to Kanata's prodigious talent and the two reminisce about his much-missed mother, Katherine. Meanwhile, Sawatari's monster lap has unsettled the drivers who are still yet to set a time.

title: The White Reaper Descends
overview: Katagiri Kanata shows what he's made of in the race on the Ashinoko track! With daring drifts through the dangerous "Death Zone," he secures a provisional eighth place despite tough competition and technical challenges.

title: The 4x4 Attack
overview: On the wet track, Kanata Katagiri impresses with his driving skills. Despite difficult weather conditions, he remains steady in the race, while his competitors struggle with the weather.

title: The Relay Straight Yin-Yang
overview: Katagiri Kanata drives his Toyota 86 GT remarkably fast, even though he lacks grip on the wet road, and overtakes several more powerful cars. Ikeda praises Kanata's precise driving technique and his experience on European racetracks, which help him under these conditions.

title: Sawatari Koki, the Demon God
overview: While Kanata continues to keep pace in the wet conditions with the ever-expanding third-place group, Sawatari dukes it out with Beckenbauer for the lead of the race.

title: A Harsh Reality
overview: A mistake by Oishi sees him exit the race, but he's not the only driver experiencing difficulties as the rain intensifies.

title: The Devil of Ashinoko Skyline
overview: As the competitors enter their third and final lap, the rain starts to ease, but the change in weather conditions brings with it something unexpected.

title: Lonesome Cowboy
overview: After schooling the rest of the field on how to drive through the fog, Kanata emerges from the white wall with a big gap to the car behind. Can he stay in front? Meanwhile, the two leaders do battle once more.

title: The Conclusion
overview: Taking advantage of the superior horsepower of his Ferrari, Akaba is hunting Kanata down, and with them running out of road, it'll be a desperate dash to the line for both drivers.

title: The Rival
overview: A new rival, Moroboshi Sena, arrives on the scene and introduces himself to Kanata.

title: The Peninsula Opens
overview: The third race on the MFG calendar at the Peninsula Manazaru gets underway and Kanata takes to the course with a major upgrade to the 86.

title: The Cost of Courage
overview: Kanata sets a rapid time in qualifying, but his mere presence on the grid has seemingly raised the level of a number of his competitors.

title: A Bitter Decision
overview: Much to his relief, Kanata manages to save Ren in the nick of time, but he bangs his elbow in the process and shifting gears is now a problem. How will he fare in the Peninsula race?

title: Miraculous Comeback
overview: Kanata drops through the positions due to an injured elbow and an inability to use second gear, until...

title: Fireball
overview: Kanata starts re-asserting himself despite his injury, but can he really make up so much lost ground?

title: Into the Final Lap
overview: Kanata's comeback continues, and finally brings him into conflict with the top three racers.

title: Their First Kiss
overview: Kanata has fought his way back up to the top positions, as the Manazuru Peninsula race comes to a close.

title: Grandma's Kei Truck
overview: Kanata joins Ren on her trip to Niigata, to visit her Grandma.

title: The 1:09PM Miracle
overview: Ren invites Kanata out to the beach, but some serious news threatens to put a damper on their plans.

title: The End of Summer
overview: A friend of Kanata's from England arrives in Japan to compete in MFG, and Aiba crashes the beach party.

title: Sparks Fly
overview: Qualifiers for the Double Lane race are underway, with Sawatari putting on an impressive time trial.

title: The Red Bullet
overview: Heading into the Double Lane race, Kanata's qualifying run is impressive but hints at the conflict to come...

title: The King's Impatience
overview: Kanata and Ren struggle with their feelings, while Beckenbauer realizes he has been tricked.

title: The Strongest Train
overview: An early mishap in the race leaves Kanata, Beckenbauer, and Sawatari scrambling to make up for last time.

title: The Midair Feints
overview: Kanata and Beckenbauer continue their ascent, leading to an unlikely first-time matchup for Kanata...

title: The Lead Group Splits
overview: Kanata and Beckenbauer finally return to the lead group, creating a fierce four-way struggle.
